name: Syrah Resources Limited
analysis: SYR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 76% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.1250, stop A$0.0990, target A$0.1400 (0.58:1) — then trail it.
